narrative:
Seven Hills City has 8,944 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.4 percentage points.
